note: Surface-completeness triage for wstETH (non-proxy). Plain ERC20 funcs (transfer/approve/allowance helpers) are exclude — covered by the erc20 standard adapter via tokens:erc20 auto-enumerate. EIP-2612 permit is a Lido-SPECIFIC cover (lido/wsteth/permit) because the standard/erc20/permit adapter pins only USDC; it backs the P3 approval-drain-shield. Lido-specific surface = wrap (stETH->wstETH) / unwrap (wstETH->stETH), and the selector-less bare-ETH stake+wrap via the payable receive() (0x00000000 native-transfer sentinel, grounded by the snapshot's receive entry).

0xea598cb0.name: wrap
0xea598cb0.reason: LIQUID-STAKING wrap — converts stETH to non-rebasing wstETH (locks shares); user fund-move. New liquid_staking domain (Tier 3).

0xde0e9a3e.name: unwrap
0xde0e9a3e.reason: LIQUID-STAKING unwrap — converts wstETH back to stETH; user fund-move.

0x00000000.name: receive (bare-ETH stake+wrap)
0x00000000.reason: SELECTOR-LESS native-ETH stake — sending ETH with EMPTY calldata hits wstETH's payable receive(), which stakes via Lido AND wraps in one step, minting wstETH to the sender. No 4-byte selector → routed under the reserved 0x00000000 native-transfer sentinel; grounded by the snapshot's receive entry. Decoded as liquid_staking.stake (amount=$tx.value; the wstETH-vs-stETH output is a wrap refinement not modeled in StakeAction). Manifest: lido/wsteth/stake-eth.

0x095ea7b3.name: approve
0x095ea7b3.reason: standard ERC20 approve — erc20 standard adapter (tokens:erc20 auto-enumerate).

0xa9059cbb.name: transfer
0xa9059cbb.reason: standard ERC20 transfer — erc20 standard adapter.

0x23b872dd.name: transferFrom
0x23b872dd.reason: standard ERC20 transferFrom — erc20 standard adapter.

0xd505accf.name: permit
0xd505accf.reason: EIP-2612 permit (standard OZ ERC20Permit; permit/nonces/DOMAIN_SEPARATOR verified via Etherscan getabi). The standard/erc20/permit adapter pins ONLY USDC, so wstETH permit needs a Lido-specific manifest — covers the P3 approval-drain-shield (typed-data sign route + on-chain permit() by-callkey). Manifest: lido/wsteth/permit.

0x39509351.name: increaseAllowance
0x39509351.reason: OZ ERC20 allowance helper — erc20 standard adapter.

0xa457c2d7.name: decreaseAllowance
0xa457c2d7.reason: OZ ERC20 allowance helper — erc20 standard adapter.

Permit.reason: EIP-2612 off-chain Permit typed-data (Permit(owner,spender,value,nonce,deadline)) signed against the wstETH EIP-712 domain (verifyingContract 0x7f39c5..2ca0). The pre-sign drain shield (P3) intercepts this signature. Manifest: lido/wsteth/permit (typed_data primary_type Permit).
